calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2025 Off Calendar

FINAL APPROVAL HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-25-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Settlement
Off Calendar Sep-25-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF MEI TAN, AN INDIVIDUAL, ON BEHALF OF HERSELF AND ON BEHALF OF ALL PERSONS SIMILARLY SITUATED's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Settlement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion for final approval of class settlement is granted. Counsel shall submit (via courtesy copy to the clerk in Department 301) a proposed final approval order and a proposed final judgment that conform to Exhibits C-1 and C-2 to the settlement agreement. The court sets the matter on June 23, 2026, for compliance hearing. The settlement administrator shall submit a declaration concerning settlement payments at least five court days in advance of the compliance hearing date.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2025 Continued To Nov-12-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement
Off Calendar May-22-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RE: PLAINTIFF MEI TAN'S, AN INDIVIDUAL, ON BEHALF OF HERSELF AND ON BEHALF OF ALL PERSONS SIMILARLY SITUATED And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement.

The unopposed motion for preliminary approval of class settlement is granted. The court will endorse the proposed order appearing at Exhibit B of the Nordrehaug Declaration and sets the matter for final approval hearing on September 25, 2025 at 9 a.m. in Department 301.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
